CustomField.description: Optional. Post-action-level performance threshold in milliseconds. When set, the post-action is logged if its execution time exceeds this value. Overrides the global default. Leave blank to inherit from the global Log Setting default. Post-actions can do arbitrary work (aggregate SOQL, computed audit, telemetry roll-ups) so per-row thresholds let admins tune alerting per action.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Log this post-action when execution exceeds this duration (ms). Leave blank to inherit the global default.
CustomField.label: Performance Threshold (ms)
